The main claim is: I believe that including the embodiment/interface of an agent within our measure/concept of its intelligence inflates the concept and leads to confusion.
The sensors that an agent/system possesses, its actuators, processing speed, data storage capacity, and so on, are things that I believe should be understood separately from intelligence.
